series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of applications, renewal forms or correspondence associated with a real estate appraiser registration, license or certification. These records may contain social security numbers or current residence addresses for appraiser applicants which are not a matter of public record for purposes of sections 149.03 and 4763.05(A)(1) of the Ohio Revised Code.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper copy is imaged and indexed on the computer. Upon confirmation that paper copy was imaged and indexed on the computer, then the paper copy is destroyed by shredding. ; Microform: Images on microfiche are to be retained 1 year after the final expiration of the credential and then the microfiche is to be destroyed by shredded ; Electronic: Images on the computer are to be retained 1 year after the final expiration of the credential and then images on the computer are to be destroyed by shredding, Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Shred
